summary:
The agent reasons that bile and liver therapy drugs have confirmed lipotropic properties, enhancing fat metabolism and reducing hepatic lipid accumulation—an essential mechanism in combating steatosis. Though no direct study exists on Eucommia ulmoides leaf extract, its traditional hepatoprotection and similarity to other effective liver therapies support a plausible benefit in ameliorating high-fat diet–induced fatty liver.
